name: FireFly Metals Ltd
description: FireFly Metals Ltd is an emerging copper-gold exploration and development company focused on advancing its flagship Green Bay Copper-Gold Project in Newfoundland, Canada. The project features a high-grade mineral resource with significant growth potential through ongoing exploration and resource definition drilling. Additionally, the company holds interest in the Pickle Lake Gold Project in Ontario, Canada, and is committed to creating long-term value for shareholders through systematic exploration and development of high-grade critical mineral assets.
